title: License request failed in airgapped environment
symptom: When attempting to apply for a community license in an airgapped environment, the error 'getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND enterprise.n8n.io' occurs.
applies_when: Attempting to register a community license
Environment is airgapped without Internet access
root_cause: The error occurs because the license registration process requires access to the n8n server at enterprise.n8n.io, which is not reachable in an airgapped environment. Community licenses are not designed to function without Internet connectivity.
fix_steps: Consider using an enterprise license if available
Contact n8n support for alternative licensing options for airgapped environments
agent_instruction: Explore enterprise licensing options for airgapped environments as community licenses are not supported.
